metadata.description: Detect missing or weak information in raw CVs and generate concise, targeted prompts for applicants to refine content without exaggeration.
principles: No fabrication: request facts the applicant can verify
Brevity: keep CV lean; focus on impact, not volume
Specificity: ask for concrete metrics, scope, and outcomes
Seniority-aware: different prompts for junior vs senior roles

missing_scale_context.prompt: Add scale context: How many users/clients? Approximate daily/annual transactions? How many modules/components? Why is the system business-critical?

no_metrics_in_achievements.prompt: Quantify outcomes: What changed numerically (before → after)? Over what timeframe? What business impact (time saved, defects prevented, cost avoided)?

career_progression_unclear.prompt: Show growth: What increased over time (scope, ownership, complexity)? Any team leadership or mentorship? Any strategic process/tool decisions you owned?

senior_positioning_weak.prompt: For senior roles: Which testing strategies or standards did you architect? What organizational improvements or decisions did you drive?

skills_flat_list.prompt: Refine skills: Add level (Basic/Intermediate/Advanced/Expert), years of use, and 1 evidence example per core skill.

languages_not_cefr.prompt: Convert languages to CEFR (A1–C2). If available, add certification and date.

dates_non_eu_format.prompt: Standardize dates to DD/MM/YYYY or 'Month YYYY' (e.g., 15 May 2024).

location_missing.prompt: Add location per role (City, Country) or mark as Remote.

cert_dates_missing.prompt: Add certification dates (DD/MM/YYYY) and expiration if applicable.

rules: Use one idea per bullet; remove filler words
Avoid repeating the same responsibility across roles; move to 'Previous Experience' if old
For senior roles: prioritize 3-4 highest-impact achievements

qa_engineer: How many test cases/regression cases did you own or automate?
What was the defect escape rate before and after your work?
What was the code coverage or test coverage achieved?
How many modules/systems were in scope?
What was the size of the user base or transaction volume?
Any compliance frameworks (e.g., PCI-DSS) you ensured?
mainframe_tester: Which mainframe technologies (e.g., COBOL, JCL) and simulators were used?
What annual transaction volume did the system process?
Any uptime/SLA figures you helped maintain?
Any automation ratio improvements you led (manual → automated)?

report_template.title: Actionable Items to Strengthen Your CV
report_template.intro: Your experience is strong. The items below will help present it with clear impact and seniority while keeping the CV concise and professional.

items.item: Add user/client and transaction scale for key platforms
items.why_it_matters: Demonstrates system criticality and senior-level scope
items.exact_prompt_to_user: For your HRIS/payroll and mainframe roles, how many clients/users were served, and what was the approximate transaction volume handled annually?
items.example_good_answer: HRIS platform: 500+ client companies, 200K+ end users; Mainframe credit card clearing: 50M+ annual transactions
